Ishti |. Death in Jyeshta masa, first annual shraddha is during Adhika Jyeshta masa itself.

Katake Guru 12:49 |. Death after Jyeshta, the monthly (masika) shraddha has to be performed both in Adhika and Nija Jyeshta masas. Darsha shraddha has to be performed in both Adhika and Nija masas. Giving away as dana 33 nos. of Apoopas, a sweet made out of rice and jaggery is shta (very good) during this month. This is normally given in a new brass vessel with ghee in another con - tainer. Those who cannot give dana on all days of the masa should try and give on the special days: Shukla Dwadashi, Pournima, Krishna Ashtami, Navami, Dwadashi, Chathurdashi and Amavasya. [ ] [ ]

specialTithis.name: Ishti |. Death in Jyeshta masa, first annual shraddha is during Adhika Jyeshta masa itself.
specialTithis.rawText: Ishti |. Death in Jyeshta masa, first annual shraddha is during Adhika Jyeshta masa itself.

specialTithis.name: Katake Guru 12:49 |. Death after Jyeshta, the monthly (masika) shraddha has to be performed both in Adhika and Nija Jyeshta masas. Darsha shraddha has to be performed in both Adhika and Nija masas. Giving away as dana 33 nos. of Apoopas, a sweet made out of rice and jaggery is shta (very good) during this month. This is normally given in a new brass vessel with ghee in another con - tainer. Those who cannot give dana on all days of the masa should try and give on the special days: Shukla Dwadashi, Pournima, Krishna Ashtami, Navami, Dwadashi, Chathurdashi and Amavasya. [ ] [ ]
